seo_title: Pickleball | Los Cab Sports Club — 59 Courts in Fountain Valley
seo_description: Experience the best pickleball in Southern California at Los Cab. 43 dedicated courts, 16 hybrid courts, stadium lighting, and expert clinics.
hero_subtitle: Home to 59 total courts and a vibrant community. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned pro, Los Cab is the place to play.
intro_title: Why Play Pickleball at Los Cab?
intro_subtitle: We offer one of the largest and most advanced pickleball facilities in the country, combined with a welcoming social atmosphere.
membership_details: $200 Initiation Fee · Includes all Sports benefits
